# Seatmap Canvas

> Open-source interactive seat map library for stadiums, theaters, and event spaces. Built with D3.js and TypeScript. MIT licensed.

## Documentation

- [Home](https://seatmap.io/): Product overview and getting started
- [Installation](https://seatmap.io/getting-started/installation): npm install `@alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas`
- [Quick Start](https://seatmap.io/getting-started/quick-start): First seatmap in minutes
- [Data Structure](https://seatmap.io/getting-started/data-structure): BlockModel and SeatModel JSON schema
- [React](https://seatmap.io/frameworks/react): React seat map component wrapper
- [API Reference](https://seatmap.io/api/overview): Configuration, methods, and events

## Live demo

- [Interactive demo](https://seatmap.io/demo): Stadium, theater, and event-space examples

## Package & source

- [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas): `@alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas`
- [GitHub](https://github.com/alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas): Source code and issues

## Learn (SEO guides)

- [FAQ](https://seatmap.io/seo/faq): Common questions about seat map libraries
- [seats.io alternative](https://seatmap.io/seo/alternatives/seats-io-alternative): Open-source comparison
- [Open-source seat map libraries](https://seatmap.io/seo/alternatives/open-source-seat-map-libraries): Library roundup
- [Stadium seating](https://seatmap.io/seo/use-cases/stadium-seating): Stadium seat map use case
- [Theater booking](https://seatmap.io/seo/use-cases/theater-booking): Theater seating chart widget
- [Ticketing platforms](https://seatmap.io/seo/use-cases/ticketing-platforms): Embed patterns for ticketing apps
- [What is an interactive seat map?](https://seatmap.io/seo/what-is-interactive-seat-map): Definition and overview
